'''mataba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabottom|seabottom]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabottom|seabottom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mataba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mætæbæth|mætæbæth]] || [[word:mætæbæj|mætæbæj]] || [[word:mætæbæsh|mætæbæsh]] || [[word:mætæbæ|mætæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:matatabath|matatabath]] || [[word:matatabaj|matatabaj]] || [[word:matatabash|matatabash]] || [[word:matataba|matataba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:matabath|matabath]] || [[word:matabaj|matabaj]] || [[word:matabash|matabash]] || [[word:mataba|mataba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:matafbath|matafbath]] || [[word:matafbaj|matafbaj]] || [[word:matafbash|matafbash]] || [[word:matafbaf|matafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:matabatha|matabatha]] || [[word:matabaja|matabaja]] || [[word:matabasha|matabasha]] || [[word:matabaka|matabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:matabath|matabath]] || [[word:matabaj|matabaj]] || [[word:matabash|matabash]] || [[word:mataba|mataba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:matabathal|matabathal]] || [[word:matabajal|matabajal]] || [[word:matabashal|matabashal]] || [[word:matabakal|matabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:matabathatha|matabathatha]] || [[word:matabajaja|matabajaja]] || [[word:matabashasha|matabashasha]] || [[word:matabaka|matabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:matabathan|matabathan]] || [[word:matabajan|matabajan]] || [[word:matabashan|matabashan]] || [[word:matabakan|matabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:matabathaoro|matabathaoro]] || [[word:matabajaoro|matabajaoro]] || [[word:matabashaoro|matabashaoro]] || [[word:matabakaoro|matabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
